name: CIRTRAN CORP
business: CIRTRAN CORP manufactures, markets, and distributes consumer products including tobacco products, medical devices, and beverages under the HUSTLER brand through its subsidiary LBC Products, Inc. under an agreement with GloBrands. The company sells to international markets and domestic outlets including retail stores, clubs, and casinos.

exposures.sentence: we completed phase one and two of our development of several HUSTLER -branded products and launched our efforts to manufacture, distribute, and sell condoms, electronic cigarettes, electronic cigars, cigars, hookahs, hookah tobacco, energy drinks, water beverages, and related merchandise, all using the HUSTLER trademark.
obtaining, at our cost and for our exclusive benefit, necessary FDA 510(k) approval for condom manufacturing;
